## LibraryRuntime.RuntimeProducedFilling.restoreSnapshot() method

Restores state from a snapshot. Pushes current state to undo stack and clears redo stack.

**Signature:**

```typescript
restoreSnapshot(snapshot: IProducedFilling): Result<void>;
```
